raw_consumer_statement: Case ID dispute XXXX {$200.00} XX/XX/year> They keep sending me emails/letter stating past due I get many different responses when I calltoday XXXX in fraud said there is no charges showing, it just hasnt cleared, been told the day I disputed there was a charge but didnt know by whom, after that rep I got supervisor saying no charge existed and the dispute would go away, it didntyesterday the rep said it had to be resubmitted and Id get an email ..did not get Macys American Express..told them nothing was received for the charge too
